info.title: SHEQ Management System API
info.description: Internal API for the SHEQ Management System API, providing access to core services.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of complaints with comprehensive filtering options including date ranges

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of complaints to return (1-100)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: General search across name, PCN, nature fields

post.description: Create a new complaint with the provided information

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific complaint by ID

put.description: Update an existing complaint with new information. Auto-sets conclusion date when status changes to closed.

delete.description: Archive an existing complaint instead of hard deleting it

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers with optional filtering and searching

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of customers to return (1-100)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search customers by name, email, or phone

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Filter customers by active status (accepts: true, false, 1, 0)

post.description: Create a new customer with the provided information

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific customer by ID

put.description: Update an existing customer with new information

delete.description: Delete an existing customer. Consider archiving instead of deleting if the customer has associated data.

409.description: Cannot delete customer with associated records

message.example: Cannot delete customer because they have associated sites or complaints. Consider archiving the customer instead (set active = false) to maintain data integrity.

get.description: Returns the health status of the application including database connectivity
Retrieve a paginated list of incident reports with comprehensive filtering options including date ranges

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of incident reports to return (1-100)

parameters.name: incident_type_id
parameters.description: Filter incident reports by incident type ID

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Filter incident reports from this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: Filter incident reports to this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: Filter incident reports by site ID

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: General search across description, location, what happened fields

post.description: Create a new incident report with the provided information

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific incident report by ID

put.description: Update an existing incident report with new information

delete.description: Archive an existing incident report instead of hard deleting it

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of sites with optional filtering

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sites to return (1-100)

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Filter sites by active status (accepts: true, false, 1, 0)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search sites by name or address

full_address.example: 123 Main Street, London, Greater London, SW1A 1AA

post.description: Create a new site with the provided information

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific site by ID

full_address.example: 123 Main Street, London, Greater London, SW1A 1AA

put.description: Update an existing site with new information

409.description: Cannot delete site with associated records

message.example: Cannot delete site because it has associated complaints. Please delete or reassign the complaints first.
